name: @archon-research/uikit-cli
description: CLI for managing local uikit package linking in consumer workspaces

scripts.build: tsgo -b && npm run bundle && npm run wrapper
scripts.wrapper:
printf '#!/usr/bin/env sh
# Use --preserve-symlinks to fix ES module resolution with npm link
# Follow symlink to find the actual script location
if [ -L "$0" ]; then
  SCRIPT="$(readlink -f "$0" 2>/dev/null || readlink "$0")"
else
  SCRIPT="$0"
fi
SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "$SCRIPT")" && pwd)"
exec node --preserve-symlinks "$SCRIPT_DIR/cli.bundle.js" "$@"
' > dist/cli.sh && chmod +x dist/cli.sh
